data.title: Federal Reserve Meeting Highlights Inflation Concerns and Economic Uncertainty
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the latest Federal Reserve meeting minutes reveal that officials generally believe inflation may persist longer than previously anticipated, adding uncertainty to the global economic outlook. The meeting underscored the significant impact of inflation expectations on economic decisions, while also highlighting the rising risks of both inflation and unemployment, posing additional challenges for policymakers.

In this macroeconomic context, investors are focusing on effectively managing asset risks and maintaining stable investments. The emphasis is on finding strategies to navigate market volatility and safeguard investments amid ongoing inflation pressures.

The meeting's insights suggest that investors need to be vigilant and adaptable in their investment strategies to mitigate risks associated with inflation and economic fluctuations. Policymakers are tasked with addressing these challenges to ensure economic stability and growth.

data.description: On May 30, 2025, 10:24 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 670.159973 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.31% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Canary Staked CRO ETF Files S-1 Form for Listing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Canary Staked CRO ETF has submitted an S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and plans to be listed on the exchange. The ETF aims to achieve exposure to CRO prices by holding Cronos (CRO) and participating in transaction verification of the Cronos POS chain, while earning additional CRO income. The net asset value (NAV) of the ETF will be calculated based on the market price of CRO.

data.title: Binance Alpha and Binance Contracts to Launch Bondex (BDXN)
data.description: Binance has announced that Binance Alpha will launch and open trading for Bondex (BDXN) at 10:00 (UTC) on June 3, 2025. Additionally, it announced that the Binance Contract Platform will launch the BDXNUSDT perpetual contract at 10:30 (UTC) on June 3, 2025, with a maximum leverage of up to 50 times.Binance is the first to announce open trading for Bondex (BDXN) contracts and to showcase BDXN tokens on Binance Alpha.As a launch benefit, eligible Binance users will receive exclusive airdrops of Binance tokens. and will need to claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha points from 10:00 (UTC) on June 3, 2025, to 10:00 (UTC) on June 4, 2025, via the Binance Alpha event page.

data.title: Assisterr Completes $2.8 Million Funding, Valuing $75 Million to Promote Decentralized AI Development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana-based AI platform Assisterr announced the completion of $2.8 million in financing, with a valuation of $75 million. Google for Startups, Outlier Ventures, Web3.com, Echo.xyz, Moonhill Capital and others participated in the investment.
Assisterr allows users to create, deploy and monetize AI agents without code, and plans to launch the native token ASRR on exchanges such as Bybit and Binance Alpha on May 30.
Assisterr focuses on small language models (SLMs) rather than large language models (LLMs), supports DeFi, NFT and other scenarios, lowers the threshold for AI creation, and builds a DeAI economic system with ASRR, supporting on-chain incentives and monetization for model construction, data verification, agent deployment and other links. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bybit Secures MiCA License in Austria
data.description:
Bybit has obtained the MiCA license from the Austrian Financial Market Authority (FMA).
source: https://ihodl.com/topnews/2025-05-30/bybit-secures-mica-license-austria/

data.title: Buidlpad Launches SAHARA Community Distribution, Allocating $8.5 Million in Tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Buidlpad announced the launch of the SAHARA community distribution event, allocating 1.4167% of the total Sahara AI tokens, with a total value of US$8.5 million. Sahara AI is a full-stack AI native blockchain platform that allows users to create, contribute and monetize AI on any chain, aiming to promote a more open and fair future for AI.
The event will be held from June 8 to 18, and KYC registration must be completed. Participants can subscribe through the event website. The tokens will be 100% unlocked at Sahara AI's token generation event (TGE) without a lock-up period.

data.title: Netflix to launch series The Altruists, focusing on SBF and Caroline
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Netflix announced that Julia Garner and Anthony Boyle will play former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried and former Alameda CEO Caroline Ellison in the new drama "The Altruists".
This limited series focuses on two "super smart idealists" who try to reshape the global financial system, but end up being involved in a $8 billion theft. The show will deeply depict the rise and fall of FTX and the relationships and motivations of the characters behind it.

data.title: James Wynn closed his 40x leveraged BTC long position, with a single loss of $37.42 million, and switched to 10x leveraged long PEPE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the whale James Wynn has closed his 40x leveraged Bitcoin long position, with a single transaction loss of $37.42 million.
In addition, a 10x leveraged long position of PEPE was opened again.
James Wynn went from making a profit of more than $87 million to losing $14.76 million in a week.

data.title: Maple Finance is officially connected to OKX Wallet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website, Maple Finance has been officially connected to OKX Wallet. Users can seamlessly access Maple Finance through OKX Wallet and participate in on-chain services such as crypto asset lending and staking.
It is reported that Maple Finance is an on-chain institutional capital market that provides undercollateralized loans to institutional borrowers and fixed income opportunities to lenders. OKX Wallet is a one-stop Web3 portal that supports more than 130 popular public chains and provides a seamless experience of four terminals: App, plug-in, web page and Telegram Mini wallet, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.

data.title: India’s Crypto Regulation Policy Coming in June: What We Know So Far
data.description:
After years of uncertainty, the government is preparing to release a discussion paper on crypto regulation in June. For a country that’s gone from heavy taxes to long periods of silence, this could be a defining moment. …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/indias-crypto-regulation-policy-coming-in-june-what-we-know-so-far/

data.title: Binance Alpha and Binance Futures to List Bondex (BDXN)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will open BDXN trading on Binance Alpha at 10:00 (UTC) on June 3, 2025, and launch BDXNUSDT perpetual contract at 10:30 (UTC) on the same day, supporting up to 50 times leverage.
In addition, eligible users can use Alpha points to receive exclusive airdrops through the Binance Alpha event page from 10:00 on June 3 to 10:00 on June 4, 2025 (UTC). (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.description: On May 30, 2025, 09:38 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,600 USDT and is now trading at 2,598 USDT, with a narrowed 4.80% decrease in 24 hours.
